nasb.text: So the priests agreed that they would take no more money from the people, nor repair the damages of the house.

esv.text: So the priests agreed that they should take no more money from the people, and that they should not repair the house.

cnv.text: 眾祭司答應不再從人民收取銀子，也不修理聖殿毀壞的地方。

ccb.text: 祭司们答应不再向民众收钱，但也不动工修殿。
